revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Commons_category_multi%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Message box |id = |halign = |malign = |backgroundcolor = |image =Gnome-mime-text-x-credits.svg|30px |heading = |message =Note how misspelled words seem to be valid links to Wikimedia Commons. Check spelling carefully.}} {{tsh|Ccatm}} ==Usage== This template is similar to {{tl|Commons category}} but shows up to 12 categories, and allows changing width or floating the box to the left. :: Usage: {{Commons category multi | topic1 | topic2 | position=left | width=20em}} :: Usage: {{Commons category multi | topic1 | topic2 | topic3}} :: Usage: {{Commons category multi | topic1 | topic2 | topic3 | topic4}} :: Usage: {{Commons category multi | topic1 | t2 | t3 | t4 | t5 | t6 | t7 | t8 | t9 | t10 | t11 | t12}} The template will state "[[:en:Wikimedia Commons|Wikimedia Commons]] has media related to (category):..." and then display the first 2 topic names in bold/italics as "'''''topic1''''' or '''''topic2'''''" (as links). The optional topics 3 or 4 would be on the next line ("or '''''topic3''''' or '''''topic4'''''"). Optional topics 5 and 6 would be on a third line. The optional {{para|position|left}} shifts the box to the left margin. The template is on the right margin by default. {{Para|delimiter}} specifies which delimiter is used to separate each entry. Be careful, as this parameter accepts wikicode as well. So, to specify semicolon (;) as the delimiter ([[H:DL|which is the Wikicode for definition list]]), use {{;}} instead. Because the leading and trailing spaces are ignored, use   to indicate space. Note that the topic names should exist as category names in Wikimedia Commons (edited using a Wikimedia login name). ==Location== {{Commons templates location}} ==Examples== The following examples show the results of the template uasge. {| |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver}} |- |This example shows the use of {{para|position|left}} {{Commons category multi | Red | Pale Green | position=left}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Red | Pale Green | position=left}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Los Angeles | New York}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Los Angeles | New York}} |- |This example shows links to misspelled words, in this case "Les Angles". {{Commons category multi | Les Angles | Now York}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Les Angles | Now York}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Ludwig van Beethoven | Richard Strauss}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Ludwig van Beethoven | Richard Strauss}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver | Bronze}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver | Bronze}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver | Bronze | Iron}} |- |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver | Bronze | Iron}} |- |This example shows the use of delimiters. See "Usage" section above for explanation. {{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver | Bronze | Iron | Copper | Brass |delimiter={{;}} }} |- |{{Commons category multi | Gold | Silver | Bronze | Iron | Copper | Brass |delimiter={{;}} }} |} ==Redirects== * {{Tl|Commonscat-N}} * {{Tl|Commoncats}} * {{Tl|Commonscat show2}} * {{Tl|Commonscats}} * {{Tl|Common cats}} * {{Tl|Commons cats}} * {{Tl|Commons cat show2}} * {{Tl|Commonscat multi}} * {{Tl|Commons cat multi}} * {{Tl|Ccatm}} * {{Tl|Commons category multiple}} * {{Tl|Commonscat-multi}} * {{Tl|Commons category-multi}} * {{Tl|Commons multiple}} * {{Tl|Commons multi}} * {{Tl|Commonscatmulti}} ==See also== {{Commons templates see also}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Interwiki category linking templates]] [[Category:Interwiki link sidebar templates]] [[Category:Wikimedia Commons templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
